COST_TO_OPEN=398,1321,1431,1056,776,716,1096,355,1351,596,1374,618,457,788,437,1445,1336,1126,792,1370,1005,1087,490,424,1094,502,878,1326,868,1435,991,1026,989,513,1291,886,418,1366,390,1385,581,422,729,438,1215,1302,1346,645,467,1498
